metadata.description: Public Claude Code skills and plugins for personal workflows.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Set up a local Obsidian-backed memory vault with session capture for Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity.

plugins.name: career
plugins.description: Job market intelligence sweep for senior technical candidates. Produces a tier-ranked report in your vault, runs an automated recruiter review, and offers weekly scheduling.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: End-of-session hygiene check, daily wrapup with Obsidian goal capture, Claude Code spend monitoring, and guided agent scaffolding.
